message:
feat: add bd export command for JSONL backup (bd-xav)

Add a proper `bd export` command that exports issues to JSONL format
(one JSON object per line), replacing the previous workaround of piping
`bd list --all --json` through Python for JSON-to-JSONL conversion.

Features:
- Export to stdout (default) or file via -o flag
- Includes labels, dependencies, and comment/dependency counts
- Excludes infra beads by default (--all or --include-infra to include)
- Excludes templates by default (--all to include)
- --scrub flag to filter out test/pollution records
- Includes wisps (ephemeral beads) automatically
- Output compatible with `bd import` for round-trip backup/restore
- Registered as read-only command (no Dolt writes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
